# Have an online store? You need  this 👉

## Metadata
- **From:** "Jolissa @ MonsterInsights" <support@monsterinsights.com>
- **Date:** 2024-10-03 06:00:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 172

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Do you run an eCommerce store and use WooCommerce, Easy Digital
Downloads, MemberPress, GiveWP, LifterLMS or Restrict Content
Pro?

If so, we have a truly effortless way to set up eCommerce
tracking in Google Analytics.

In fact, you can have it done in a couple clicks 😲.

Tracking your eCommerce store’s performance 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kcmlwJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWxpdGUtb25ib2FyZGluZyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1lY29tbWVyY2UmX19zPWpjNGhhdXc1cWI0Z2JwZTM0NTVkIn0.Wo0YTmU777RMcEyBhoSJZKDPdwrzzHRRt0GWj-xxsCE )
 will help you unlock key insights like:

* Top converting traffic sources
* Top performing products
* Conversion rates
* Number of transactions
* Total revenue
* Average order value
* Total products added and removed from cart

With MonsterInsights, you’re just a few clicks away from tracking
your online store’s performance.

And lucky for you, 👉 MonsterInsights Pro is 50% off today 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kcmlwJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWxpdGUtb25ib2FyZGluZyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1lY29tbWVyY2UmX19zPWpjNGhhdXc1cWI0Z2JwZTM0NTVkIn0.1-tXl1jjq0Yg88kiffXkJMnkB4yDna_0f46-i6wpYyo )
. 👈

The best part is that there’s no need to hire a developer or edit
website code. It just works. The MonsterInsights eCommerce addon
will automatically detect and start properly tracking.

You can then see all your eCommerce data at a glance inside your
WordPress dashboard or inside Google Analytics.

So don’t wait around! Start growing your online store today! 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kcmlwJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWxpdGUtb25ib2FyZGluZyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1lY29tbWVyY2UmX19zPWpjNGhhdXc1cWI0Z2JwZTM0NTVkIn0.1-tXl1jjq0Yg88kiffXkJMnkB4yDna_0f46-i6wpYyo )


Until next time,
